name: Long Beach Coffee & Tee
address: 220 W Park Ave, Long Beach, NY 11561
about: Long Beach Coffee & Tee is an indoor golf simulator venue combined with a coffee shop and full bar. The facility features three state-of-the-art golf simulator bays available for both walk-ins and private events. Patrons can enjoy 18 holes of golf, complemented by a range of other activities including dart boards, shuffleboard, bowling, and cornhole. The venue is styled with indoor and outdoor play spaces and is positioned as a multi-functional spot for work, casual outings, or events. Pricing is offered on an hourly basis, with different packages available, including options that include food and drinks. The venue operates on a 24-hour cancellation policy and requires pre-authorization for weekend and holiday bookings.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulator bays for high-quality practice and play
Convenient mix of golf and other activities like darts and shuffleboard in one location
Flexible booking options for both individual walk-ins and private events
Availability of club rentals for those without their own equipment

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service available with a full menu.
Full bar service available, including wine and beer.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, free club rental is included with all simulator packages.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue has its own full kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take about 1 hour to complete, depending on simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Long Beach Coffee & Tee is family-friendly and offers activities suitable for all ages, including cornhole and other games.
